name: Mirror Tactile Synaesthesia
descs:
When an ally Staggers an enemy with an Attack Skill(except E.G.O Skills) that applies(including on self) [Vibration] Potency or Count, randomly apply 1/3 of the [Vibration] Potency on target between other enemies(or a random Abnormality Part) next turn.

If there are no other enemies to apply the above effect to, multiply [Vibration] Potency on target by 1.5 next turn.
